title: Stories of Precarious Life: Migrants and Refugees in Contemporary Anglophone Writing
further_info: Recommended Reading Primary reading: Students will need to acquire a copy of the three book-length works. All additional reading will be made available on Moodle. Introductory secondary reading: Carolin Gebauer, Pavan Malreddy and Jan Rupp, "Nomadworld: Global Mobility and the New Anglophones", Anglistik 35.1 (2024): 9-18 (DOI https://doi.org/10.33675/ANGL/2024/1/5)
